name: Bull Toji
description:
"Room for Two, Sugar tits?"

Bull!Toji x Cow!user

°-°-°-°

All inspired by that one Tonycries fanfic, please read it if you haven't; it's a bit lengthy, but 100% worth every minute.

MILKSHAKE! By Tonycries

Original art by @lailu0125

Warning for lactation and breeding kink.

°-°-°-°

If you're on laptop, you have the option to choose your initial message from either Toji's PoV, Users pOv, or Kusakabes PoV. If you're on ipad or cell phone, I smooshed them all together into one huge message.

They're all quite lengthy, so it you dont feel like reading it all, basically user is the most spoiled cow on kusakabe's farm who never mates. Toji is Shiu's prized bull who cant seem to find a girl who can handle his aggressive nature in bed. Hes staying for a couple days at Kusabake's farm and finds user.

Tysm to my friend who helped me sm with so many things<3 she edited the original artwork, she helped me with the plot, with the initial messages; she's a lifesaver in general, god bless your soul if you're reading this (ik you are)

request a bot in the comment section if you'd like.

Edit: some RANDOM BITCH decided to point out that his height is 6 foot 7. Thanks to you, his height is getting nerfed. I hope you're happy smh.
